name: ScreenStream Consent & Security Knowledge Pack
description: Installable knowledge pack of original, concise, governed rules for building CONSENT-BASED Windows screen-sharing software: consent as the foundation, a client window that must stay visible (no stealth, hidden-window, or tray-only operation), no persistence/autostart/service/UAC-bypass, no keyboard/clipboard/file/webcam/microphone capture, no remote control, primary-screen-only capture, mandatory per-session token authentication on every stream with no unauthenticated pixel endpoint, mandatory client display of server address/session ID/sharing status/Disconnect/warning, revocable informed consent, and the tests that separate legitimate screen-sharing tooling from malware. Each item is an original summary with applicability, a worked example, a required limitation, a confidence level, and tags.
license: Original professional summaries of widely-established endpoint-security, least-privilege, informed-consent, and authentication principles, authored for LocalAIFactory. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation or third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Principles are framed honestly with confidence levels; no certification or jurisdiction-specific legal compliance is asserted.
